steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “To improve this system” is the crucial clue. The blank requires a word meaning improvements or systematic changes to fix a problem.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Reforms” directly means systematic changes made to correct a problem—the exact solution type signaled by the context.

The other three either refer to studies (“investigations”), growth without improvement (“expansions”), or something wholly unrelated (“possessions”).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
